cards.front: What determines which iterations of a parallelized for loop are executed by a thread in multi-threaded programming?
cards.back: The order of execution is determined by the thread ID and the loop index

cards.front: In a parallelized for loop, which thread executes the iteration where the loop index is an odd number?
If a parallelized for loop is divided among 4 threads, how many iterations will thread 0 execute?
cards.back: Thread 0 will execute all iterations of the loop

cards.front: What is the main advantage of using parallelized for loops in multi-threaded programming?
cards.back: Improved performance by utilizing multiple CPU cores

cards.front: Which thread executes the iteration where the loop index is divisible by 4?
